loveQuiz.question: What's your favorite thing about me?
How do you like receiving love?

wheelOptions: Send you a voice message right now
Share my favorite memory of us
Write you a poem on the spot
compliments: Your smile could light up the darkest room
You're the most beautiful person I've ever known
Your laugh is my favorite sound in the world
You make me want to be better every day
Your kindness touches everyone around you
I love how passionate you are about things
You have the most beautiful soul
You're my favorite person to talk to
You make even ordinary moments magical
I'm so lucky to have you in my life
You're perfect just the way you are
Your dreams and ambitions are beautiful
